key.name: search-engine
key.description: This value is the search engine that will be used when the user enters a search query into the command palette.

key.name: zoom
key.description: This value is the zoom level of the browser. Please do not modify this value yourself as this can create unintended side effects.

key.name: maximized
key.description: This value is whether the window is maximized or not.

key.name: rooms
key.description:
This value stores the rooms data.
Each entry is a tuple: (room name, room icon, pinned urls).

key.name: restore-tabs
key.description: This value stores the tabs to restore.

key.name: search-autocomplete-enabled
key.description: This value is whether search autocomplete is enabled or not.

key.name: bang-autocomplete-enabled
key.description: This value is whether !bang autocomplete is enabled or not.

key.name: devtools-enabled
key.description: This value is whether developer tools is enabled or not.

key.name: initial-size
key.description: This value is the main window's size.
